design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title + niche_landing + ecommerce operators + 2026-07-06T10:04:05Z selected workflow-command-center hero, Outfit typography, gapless-bento-grid + workflow-playbook-timeline + implementation-checklist components, GSAP paradigms card-stacking and hover-physics. AIDA Check: Hero frames attention on order/support overload, Interest via market proof and sources, Desire via cache-based workflows, Action via persistent CTAs. Font Selection: Outfit (distinct from prior pages). Hero Math Verification: clamp headline max-width tuned for 2–3 lines at desktop. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded animations with fallback. Label Sweep & Button Check: all CTAs contrast-checked and point to app.getsupers.com.
headline: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

site_brief.audience: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin AI assistant
ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for ecommerce operators monitoring orders, support, and repetitive admin

summary: A premium, operator‑grade landing page showing how Super acts as a personal AI agent that can operate real ecommerce tools, reuse a computer-use cache, and reduce the cost and friction of repeated order monitoring, customer support, and back‑office admin workflows.
